task:
Configure RenderDoc for remote capture replay on development devices by editing /home/user/.local/share/qrenderdoc/UI.config (a flat JSON document). Apply all of the following edits in a single save:

1. Set `"RemoteHosts"` to a JSON array of exactly two objects, in this order and shape, in compact form with NO whitespace between tokens: `[{"Hostname":"build-box.lan","Port":39570},{"Hostname":"perf-node-01.internal","Port":39570}]`.
2. Set `"AdbScabbardPath"` to the exact string `"/opt/android-sdk/platform-tools/adb"`.
3. Set `"AlwaysReplayLocally"` to `false`.

The top-level `"rdocConfigData": 1` marker must still be present after saving. Do not remove or rename any other key.

verification.description: RemoteHosts array contains the two hosts in the correct order
